app.title: Plant Disease Identifier

app.disclaimer: AI-assisted guidance only. Consult a local agriculture officer before using any chemical treatments.

plant.title: Select Your Plant

plant.required: Please select a plant type to continue

capture.title: Capture Leaf Image
capture.subtitle: Take a clear photo of the affected leaf
capture.dragDrop: Drag and drop an image here, or click to select
capture.cropHint: Adjust to focus on the affected leaf area

questions.title: Help Us Confirm
questions.subtitle: Answer these questions about your plant
questions.yellow_spots: Do you see yellow spots on the leaves?
questions.leaf_curl: Are the leaves curling or rolling?
questions.white_powder: Is there white powdery substance on leaves?
questions.edge_drying: Are the leaf edges drying or browning?
questions.stem_rot: Is there any rotting at the stem base?
questions.wilting: Is the plant wilting despite watering?
questions.dark_spots: Are there dark brown or black spots?
questions.stunted_growth: Is the plant showing stunted growth?

confirmation.subtitle: Based on image analysis and your responses
